Q7: Welcome to the ninth day of the study on social behavior     Today, you will play more games with different virtual partners. These “virtual partners” are not real people but are programs that can simulate real-life behavior, just like characters in videogames. In each game you will be matched with another virtual partner who behaves independently, so you will never play with the same virtual partner twice. You will have to make decisions that affect the payoff of yourself and the virtual partner.     Participation in this study is still voluntary, and you may withdraw at any time, but you will only be compensated if you complete the entire study (i.e., all 10 days). After completing the entire study, you will receive a fixed compensation of 7.5 pounds and you will receive an additional bonus payment based on your performance of one of the games per day (these games will be chosen at random).     Here is a detailed calender that you can download if needed.     Download calender      To get further instructions about the study, please check the box 'Read, understood and approved' below, and then click on the next button. By checking this box, you indicate that you have read, understood and approved this statement and are over the age of 18.
